api: Workday REST (HCM v1) API (conservative endpoint subset)
scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (workers, organizations, jobs); legacy is a deliberately conservative read-only Workday REST client and ships no writes. The connector's assigned documentation_url is unreachable ('manual intervention needed'); this bundle is authored entirely from the legacy Go package per docs/migration/conventions.md ('legacy is ground truth over any doc').
